feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: To Wage Against Time, Heart, and Death
entry.summary:
Author: RedPanda25

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 896Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: The narration of Arthur's thoughts while he knows that he is dying in the ending of the series. Merlin is there. Has always been there and it is only now that Arthur is dying that he truly realizes how much Merlin has done. And how much Arthur loves Merlin.

entry.title: You and me, we've got (browser) history
entry.summary:
Author: liviapeleia

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,994Chapters: 31/?Kudos: 203

Summary: A season 1 canon divergent AU told through Reddit posts. Gaius and Uther are having a secret love affair. Somehow, Geoffrey might be involved. Arthur has more throwaway accounts than brain cells, Morgana is an SJW (affectionate), Gwen is the only sane person, and Merlin is absolutely not in love, no way, never. And how the hell does Kilgharrah's cave have WiFi?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Touch Of Love
entry.summary:
Author: BeautifulFiction

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,430Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 212

Summary: Merlin's eyes changed when he did magic. He knew that. In the privacy of his own head, Arthur had come to think of that golden gleam as beautiful since he'd discovered the secret of his sorcery. This was different. It crackled like lightning; a storm held in Merlin's gaze. It cast brief light upon his cheekbones, spilling odd shadows across his face. 'What's happening?' 'He is dying,' a woman's voice said, sugar-sweet. 'And he will take you with him, Arthur Pendragon.' --- A routine hunt threatens to become a fatal disaster when Arthur and Merlin are captured and imprisoned in a dungeon used during the Purge. Can they fight their way to freedom, or will Merlin's power be the death of them?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin (Merlin)
  • Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)

entry.title: THE BOND SERIES: TRIALS OF DESTINY SEASON 1 EPISODE 4
entry.summary:
Author: Foreverwolf_6

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 39Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: Obsessed with breaking the Link, Merlin puts his sanity on the line. Feeling he has no choice, Arthur invokes the Magic Trials, a test that could cost them both not only their lives, but the Bond itself. Can they find their back to each other before it's too late? Established MERTHUR. MerlimWHUMP! Protective!Caring!Arthur. SLASH. Mostly T, some graphic scenes (slash and torture).

entry.title: The Bond Series: Season 2: Episode 1 "Home Isn't Home"
entry.summary:
Author: Foreverwolf_6

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 90,469Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 15

Summary: Change is for the young, they say. Arthur and Merlin struggle to build their dream of Albion while facing old enemies from within, and a new enemy on the horizon threatens to destroy everything. Consequences for a choice made long ago rear, and others are made which may destroy them both. Are they strong enough to stand united, or will they falter?

entry.title: Beneath Secrets, Blankets, and a Canopy Bed
entry.summary:
Author: NikkiMary

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,331Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 18

Summary: The castle has been in complete chaos ever since Lady Catrina married Uther, and it falls to Merlin to discover how exactly she enchanted the king in order to fix the awful situation they’ve all found themselves trapped in. The moment he comes up with a plan, he rushes to Arthur’s chambers to share the news, after all, he’ll need the prince’s help this time.What Merlin doesn’t expect, however, is for Arthur to take so long to return that he ends up falling asleep while waiting for him… nor does he expect to wake up to strange, and strangely familiar, noises accompanied by the sound of his own name. What exactly could Arthur be doing to moan Merlin’s name in such a breathless voice? Or: Merlin sneaks into Arthur’s chambers, falls asleep while waiting for him, and wakes up to find Arthur masturbating while calling his name.

entry.title: You and Me, Me and You
entry.summary:
Author: winaloneimlosing

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,285Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 5

Summary: What if Merlin is Albion - without you, there will be no Albion, a dragon once said, wise or not - and so it’s Merlin’s greatest time of need that Arthur is reborn for?What if, after waiting over a millennia for Arthur, through wars and famines and plagues, Merlin finally loses hope, but before he can join Arthur in Avalon instead, a certain dollophead makes a reappearance?What if this was how Arthur came back; to a broken kingdom and a broken Merlin? What if this is how he starts to heal?

entry.title: 500 Miles From My Home
entry.summary:
Author: alesha_333

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,155Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 61

Summary: Merlin counts the miles at first. Ten, because he is still able to turn back.Fifty because it finally feels like leaving. He tells himself he will stop. He’ll go back. He doesn’t.The words echo in his mind, the blue in Arthur’s eyes dimming, the flinch at the word traitor. A hundred miles from Camelot, that’s all he needs, right?

entry.title: the ghost come back
entry.summary:
Author: indigotigress7

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,875Chapters: 3/6Kudos: 61

Summary: Twenty-first-century Merlin, tired of waiting for Arthur to return, travels back in time determined to make the best of a second chance in Camelot.(Gaius, still reeling from watching his nephew drink from a poisoned chalice and nearly perish from its effects, is almost too relieved that Merlin has woken up at all to notice how strangely he’s behaving.)(Almost.)

entry.title: A Legend that Begins With a Crush
entry.summary:
Author: Clearwater96

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,033,494Chapters: 131/?Kudos: 1,664

Summary: Arthur Pendragon and Merlin were literally from two different worlds. One is a prince from a great kingdom and the other a common farm boy from the next kingdom over. These two should have never met.But that was before they realized their parents were once friends and arranged the two of them to marry when they reached adulthood. That was before Uther turned on magic and Hunith went on the run with her infant son.Now, twenty years have passed and the Prince, Arthur Pendragon is far out of his depth. After four months of marriage and learning what he has about Merlin, he knows that things need to change, but doesn’t know what can be done.And with every attempt at trying going wrong, with mysterious boys showing up wanting to be a knight, strange physician’s trying to coerce his consort away, even stranger ladies who’ve seen to weaken Arthur’s brain, and the arrival of an odd Druid boy they need to risk it all just to get to safety…will Arthur ever get things to go right?

entry.title: I Thought You Were Dead
entry.summary:
Author: alkimi

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 617Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 2
